title: Get started with data engineering on Azure
summary: Learn how to perform core data engineering workloads on Microsoft Azure.

sections.title: Get started with data engineering on Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to perform core data engineering workloads on Microsoft Azure.

lessons.title: Introduction to data engineering on Azure
lessons.content_md:
This module describes how Microsoft Azure provides a comprehensive platform for data engineering.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-data-engineering-azure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to data engineering on Azure

lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2
lessons.content_md:
Discover how Data Lake Storage provides a repository where you can upload and store unstructured data bringing new efficiencies to processing big data analytics.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/introduction-to-azure-data-lake-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Get started with data engineering on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Get started with data engineering on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
